name: Flan-T5 Small
description: Instruction-tuned small model, strong CPU performance

name: NuExtract Tiny
description: Designed for structured extraction, lightweight compared to LLMs

name: Microsoft Phi-1.5
description: Small (~1B) general language model, CPU-possible but heavier

name: Pegasus XSum
description: Summarization model fine-tuned on XSum dataset, good for abstractive summarization

name: DistilBART CNN 12-6
description: Distilled BART model fine-tuned on CNN/DailyMail, good for extractive-style summarization on CPU

name: DistilBART CNN 6-6
description: Smaller distilled BART trained on CNN/DailyMail, produces 2-3 sentence abstractive summaries. Faster and lighter than the 12-6 variant with modest quality tradeoff.

name: T5 Small
description: Lightweight T5 model at ~240MB, requires instruction prefix. Good CPU performance for summarization tasks.
